title: Refulgence
description: A small 1.20.1 Quilt Minecraft mod with a focus on adding new lighting blocks.
body:
# This project is not being actively developed, it's just something I'm working on in my free time. Updates will be few and far between.

# Overview
A small 1.20.1 Quilt Minecraft mod with a focus on adding new lighting blocks.

In its current state, the mod isn't very big. It doesn't add a lot, but it's just a little hobby project of mine to learn Minecraft modding.

I'm trying to keep the blocks and items I add in a similar style to those in vanilla so that they feel like they could be added in a new update and not feel that far-fetched.

I'd love any feedback on the GitHub page!

## Blocks

The mod currently adds 3 new blocks:

- Jar, no light emission (it's a jar)
- Glowstone Jar, light level 14
- Redstone Jar, light level 7

I'm planning on adding a Glow Ink Jar and a Glow Ink Block in the next update, and then whatever other blocks I think of in future updates.

##  Can I use this in a modpack?
Of course!! Just leave credit to me as the author.

### All models and textures are created by me.
